title: MrLibCore
description: MrLibCore is for MrUltimate and Other MrPlugins. !!! ITS REQUIRED !!!
body:
![Stats](https://mrneznamy.eu/api/stats/badge.svg) *Older versions are not and will not be supported*
*This plugin offers no documentation, and is useless on its own. There is no support for this plugin, and you will not be provided with any help developing your own plugins using this library.*



MrLibCore is not a regular plugin, it is a library containing important functions for running MrPlugins. This plugin does nothing by itself, so if you don't use my plugins, you don't need this plugin.
- MrSellChests (From version 2.0.0) - MrUltimateJobs (From version 2.0.0) - MrUltimateShop (From version 2.0.0) - MrUltimateFishing (From version 2.0.0) - MrCommunityQuest (From version 2.0.0) - MrVoteTrain
- Auto Updates - Modritnth Plugin Version Checker - GUI System - Economy System - Hologram System - Message System - Color System - MySQL Connector - SqLITE Connector
- Vault for economy - PlaceholderAPI for placeholders
